setAdjustedHSLColor.d: Transition to color H:{0}° / S:{1}% / L:{2}% in {3}{4}

p.d: and wait for execution to finish
p.w: webCoRE can only wait on piston executions of pistons within the same instance as the caller. Please note that global variables updated in the callee piston do NOT get reflected immediately in the caller piston, the new values will be available on the next run.

setTileColor.d: Set piston tile #{0} colors to {1} over {2}{3}

setTile.d: Set piston tile #{0} title  to "{1}", text to "{2}", footer to "{3}", and colors to {4} over {5}{6}

writeToFuelStream.d: Write data point '{2}' to fuel stream {0}{1}{3}

lifxBreathe.d: Breathe LIFX lights matching {0} to color {1}{2}{3}{4}{5}{6}{7}

p.d: with a peak at {v}% of the period

lifxPulse.d: Pulse LIFX lights matching {0} to color {1}{2}{3}{4}{5}{6}

was_less_than_or_equal_to.dd: were less than or equal to
